basics.name: Wenyang Liu
basics.label: Computer Vision & Robotic Perception Researcher
basics.summary: Computer vision and robotic perception researcher building reliable visual AI for smart manufacturing and real-world imaging systems. 20 publications, 300+ citations, and h-index 8.

work.name: Hyundai–NTU–A*STAR Corporate Lab, NTU
work.summary: Develop vision-based robotic perception systems for reliable industrial part picking in smart manufacturing.
highlights: Develop open-world object detection and segmentation methods combining language prompts and visual references
Build 6D pose estimation and grasp pose generation pipelines for cluttered industrial scenes
Adapt visual foundation models to previously unseen parts and real-world factory constraints

work.name: School of EEE, Nanyang Technological University
work.summary: Led research on image/video restoration, lightweight super-resolution, and corrupted multimedia recovery.
highlights: Published in CVPR, NeurIPS, IEEE TMM, ACM MM, and JVCIR
Developed deep learning models for visual degradation: bitstream corruption, watermark noise, low-resolution inputs
Built visual and byte-level representation models for multimedia forensics

courses: Thesis: Visual Image Restoration and Super-Resolution Using Deep Learning
Supervisors: Prof. Chau Lap-Pui (IEEE Fellow) and Assoc. Prof. Yap Kim-Hui
Efficient computing systems, low-power video decoding, AI hardware acceleration
